design_philosophy: Minimal, Premium, Elegant, Luxury, Modern, Fast, Mobile First. An editorial magazine-style aesthetic inspired by Sabyasachi and Anita Dongre. Generous whitespace, elegant typography, warm and soft shadows.

hero_banner.style: Full width or large contained block, high-quality image background with a subtle linear gradient overlay (e.g., bg-black/20) to ensure text contrast. Text should use h1 styling in White or Gold.
hero_banner.layout: Flex column, centered or left-aligned depending on image composition. Generous padding.

product_card.style: Minimalist. Image takes 80%+ of height. Soft rounded corners (rounded-xl). Hovering on the image reveals Quick View and View Details buttons. Image subtly scales on hover.
product_card.typography: Product name in text-lg medium (heading font), price in text-base (body font) text-accent_brown.
product_card.shadow: No shadow default, soft shadow on hover.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 uppercase tracking-wider text-sm font-medium hover:bg-primary_hover transition-colors
buttons.secondary: border border-primary text-primary rounded-full px-8 py-3 uppercase tracking-wider text-sm font-medium hover:bg-gold_light transition-colors
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-[#128C7E] flex items-center gap-2

admin_dashboard.style: Clean, utilitarian but retaining brand colors. White background for cards, Cream background for main layout. Primary Gold for active states/CTAs.
admin_dashboard.components: Shadcn UI based: Tables for products, Sidebar for navigation, Form for product adding. Data density should be balanced.

navigation.style: Glassmorphism (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md) or solid Cream. Sticky at top. Logo centered or left. Links in elegant uppercase.
navigation.mobile: Hamburger menu opening a full-screen or elegant side drawer.

hero_banners.description: Editorial shot of women in elegant red dresses
Close up of model with luxury gold jewelry and sari

products.description: Woman in purple and gold luxury sari
Woman in elegant green and white dress

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS for styling. Set the custom fonts in tailwind.config.js.
Implement the customer-facing website with an editorial layout: generous padding (py-16 or py-24), large images, and serif headings.
For the Customer Homepage, structure the 'Featured Collection' in an asymmetric bento grid for visual interest.
All buttons and clickable elements must include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button').

Cart must not have a standard payment checkout. Instead, accumulate items in state and when checking out, format a WhatsApp message with the list of items and redirect to WhatsApp using the provided button styling.
Admin Dashboard should use a consistent sidebar layout with Shadcn UI components. Maintain the warm color palette (accent_brown text, primary gold active states) to keep it connected to the brand.
Ensure all images maintain aspect ratio. For product cards, enforce a standard aspect ratio (e.g., aspect-[3/4]) with object-cover.
